---
title: "經導管心臟瓣膜治療技術"
subtitle: "Transcatheter Valve Intervention — Mainz 2024 Fellowship Report"
author: "謝慕揚醫師 Dr. Drake Mu-Yang Hsieh, MD, PhD"
date: 2024-12-24
lang: zh-TW
---

## 關於本報告 About This Report

本報告為新竹臺大分院心血管中心謝慕揚醫師於 2024 年 11-12 月赴德國美茵茲大學醫院 (Johannes Gutenberg University Mainz) 心臟瓣膜中心進修之成果報告。

This report documents the fellowship training of Dr. Drake Hsieh at the Heart Valve Center, University Medicine Mainz, Germany (November–December 2024).

### 進修內容 Training Content

- **M-TEER**: 二尖瓣經導管緣對緣修復 (Mitral Valve Transcatheter Edge-to-Edge Repair)
- **T-TEER**: 三尖瓣經導管緣對緣修復 (Tricuspid Valve Transcatheter Edge-to-Edge Repair)
- **TAVI/TAVR**: 經導管主動脈瓣膜植入/置換術 (Transcatheter Aortic Valve Implantation/Replacement)

共參與 **125 例**經導管瓣膜手術：M-TEER 33 例、T-TEER 18 例、TAVI 74 例。

### 語言版本 Language Versions

- [中文版 Chinese Version](zh/index.qmd)
- [English Version](en/index.qmd)

---

新竹臺大分院心血管中心 | National Taiwan University Hospital Hsinchu Branch, Cardiovascular Center
